response.body: {"id":"chatcmpl-103","object":"chat.completion","created":1766665378,"model":"ministral-3:3b","system_fingerprint":"fp_ollama","choices":[{"index":0,"message":{"role":"assistant","content":"[{\"selector\":\".shadow.bg-white\",\"type\":\"CssSelector\",\"description\":\"Event cards with shadow and white background\",\"reasoning\":\"Each event is contained in a div with these classes, making it a stable selector for individual events\"},{\"selector\":\".lg\\\\:w-1\\\\/3.lg\\\\:pl-4 > .shadow\",\"type\":\"CssSelector\",\"description\":\"Event card within grid column\",\"reasoning\":\"More specific selector using the grid layout classes for event cards\"},{\"selector\":\"//div[contains(@class,'shadow') and contains(@class,'bg-white')]//h3\",\"type\":\"XPath\",\"description\":\"Event titles within event cards\",\"reasoning\":\"XPath selector for h3 elements inside event cards\"}]"},"finish_reason":"stop"}],"usage":{"prompt_tokens":400,"completion_tokens":150,"total_tokens":550}}
response.content: [{"selector":".shadow.bg-white","type":"CssSelector","description":"Event cards with shadow and white background","reasoning":"Each event is contained in a div with these classes, making it a stable selector for individual events"},{"selector":".lg\:w-1\/3.lg\:pl-4 > .shadow","type":"CssSelector","description":"Event card within grid column","reasoning":"More specific selector using the grid layout classes for event cards"},{"selector":"//div[contains(@class,'shadow') and contains(@class,'bg-white')]//h3","type":"XPath","description":"Event titles within event cards","reasoning":"XPath selector for h3 elements inside event cards"}]
